name: property managers handling 10-20 properties tool
description: For property managers handling 10-20 properties, inefficient scheduling causes missed maintenance deadlines. We provide a cloud-based scheduling system instead of manual scheduling via spreadsheets and phone calls.
problem_solved: Inefficient scheduling of property inspections and maintenance tasks.
